name: notification-system
description: Complete notification system with toast messages, React context provider, SSE API route, and bell icon badge
author: AD AI Engine
instructions:
1. Wrap your app with NotificationProvider
2. Use the useNotifications() hook to show toasts: toast.success('Done!')
3. Place NotificationBell in your header for the bell icon with badge count
4. The SSE API route streams real-time notifications to connected clients
5. Call addNotification() from the provider to push persistent notifications
